tool.name: WebAtlas Consolidate Metadata
tool.description: Converts an image to Zarr and consolidates metadata

param.name: input_image
param.label: TIFF or JPEG image
param.help: Input image to convert to Zarr. JPEG-compressed TIFF images are automatically decompressed before conversion.

param.name: image_type
param.label: Input image type
param.help: Choose the type of input image.
